## Drawing (class)

The Drawing class represents a drawing in Tekla Structures.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/7b690fe6-8004-2c5d-aa07-f60af8ea16f8)

### Methods
#### `public bool CommitChanges()`

Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/bc26a611-bd6a-535a-4461-943b8bf5351c)

#### `public bool CommitChanges(string Message)`

Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

**Parameters:**
- `Message` (System.String) — The message to be saved with the commit.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/92109855-5313-7446-bef4-ab6dde6875f1)

#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the drawing. An active drawing cannot be deleted.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4bcff604-27c4-487f-bb7d-5d80a2d87d8b)

#### `public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)`

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Double>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/b25f0e6b-ab5c-154a-a45c-4f5868a20599)

#### `public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, double> values)`

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `names` (System.Collections.Generic.List<String>) — List of names to get the values for.
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Double>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/7f327fc5-14b5-f534-da39-b68d3f87124a)

#### `public static IList<Identifier> GetIdsOfUnnumberedDrawings(IList<Drawing> drawingsToBeChecked)`

Returns the list of identifiers of those drawings in the input that are NOT up to date regarding numbering in the drawing

**Parameters:**
- `drawingsToBeChecked` (System.Collections.Generic.IList<Drawing>) — The list of drawings that we want to check for numbering status

**Returns:** `IList<Identifier>` — List of the unnumbered drawings' IDs

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/bc5c0f50-d50e-92ca-83ef-390151680205)

#### `public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, int> values)`

Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Int32>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/20a7d099-ebee-b016-ffc7-0181a1219405)

#### `public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, int> values)`

Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `names` (System.Collections.Generic.List<String>) — List of names to get the values for.
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Int32>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/b485bd81-5ccf-68e4-0453-caea6b1d0dde)

#### `public string GetPlotFileName(bool includeRevisionInfo)`

Get plot file name.

**Remarks:** Note: The returned plot file name can contain invalid file name characters.

**Parameters:**
- `includeRevisionInfo` (System.Boolean) — Whether to include revision info.

**Returns:** `String` — The plot file name or an empty string if an error occured.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/fa70baa3-ad78-2e3c-88ca-0b77cb81cd21)

#### `public string GetPlotFileNameExt(IncludeRevisionMarkEnum includeRevisionInfo)`

Get plot file name.

**Remarks:** Note: The returned plot file name can contain invalid file name characters.

**Parameters:**
- `includeRevisionInfo` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.IncludeRevisionMarkEnum) — How or if to include revision info.

**Returns:** `String` — The plot file name or an empty string if an error occured.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6288f4e4-4baf-656d-57bb-c63dee354493)

#### `public ContainerView GetSheet()`

Gets the sheet of the drawing.

**Returns:** `ContainerView` — The sheet of the drawing.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/fe921886-00b9-57d3-0488-92bd25014c66)

Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,String>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/a0039213-2e79-912f-5bdf-5e6dd417c092)

#### `public bool GetStringUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, string> values)`

Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `names` (System.Collections.Generic.List<String>) — List of names to get the values for.
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,String>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/474a80dc-539a-2734-4b5c-1ea52f86e750)

#### `public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)`

Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be gotten.
- `Value` (System.Double.) — The value of the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was gotten successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/203a39af-db6b-e317-5de3-f0301c1642f2)

#### `public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)`

Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be gotten.
- `Value` (System.Int32.) — The value of the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was gotten successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f773aabe-fe4e-dba3-bf33-f6f927441a85)

#### `public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)`

Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be gotten.
- `Value` (System.String.) — The value of the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was gotten successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/5335a30d-ac20-6231-5b02-22e14c6980a7)

#### `public abstract bool Insert()`

Inserts the object instance into the database. The inserted instance must be of a real type.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/020bf502-50ea-ba9f-bf32-a167db34fe82)

#### `public override bool IsSameDatabaseObject(DatabaseObject Object)`

Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

**Parameters:**
- `Object` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DatabaseObject) — The other object to be used.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the objects are referencing the same database object.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6b1b3008-c9dd-5b97-0881-89ccc580b3e7)

#### `public abstract bool Modify()`

Modifies the instance in the database.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/22491355-41a3-d4b9-ff88-842fe212aaf0)

#### `public bool PlaceViews()`

Places views on the sheet. Computes the required size of the views to fit the parts, then places the views so that they fit on the sheet and do not overlap. Adjusts the sheet size if needed.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1e1578e4-084f-21a9-3d1a-2b03140440ce)

#### `public abstract bool Select()`

Selects the object instance from the database.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/44b1746f-df01-19ef-b98f-d577d5dd0435)

#### `public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)`

Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.Double) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/995715f7-c86c-86d0-359f-76dc4d14197a)

#### `public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)`

Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.Int32) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/88a5c4aa-fb12-e341-ee9e-fcd3284fab68)

#### `public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)`

Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.String) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/633cfaf7-22e7-1bb1-6596-053d78749c52)

### Properties
- `CommitMessage` (String, get) — Gets the commit message
- `CreationDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing creation date.
- `DrawingTypeStr` (String, get) — The type of the drawing
- `IsFrozen` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is frozen.
- `IsIssued` (Boolean, get) — Describes whether the drawing is issued.
- `IsIssuedButModified` (Boolean, get) — Describes whether the drawing is issued but modified since it was issued.
- `IsLocked` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is locked.
- `IsLockedBy` (String, get) — Gets the logged in username that set the drawing to locked
- `IsMasterDrawing` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is a master drawing (shown with a special symbol on the drawing list).
- `IsReadyForIssue` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is ready for issue.
- `IsReadyForIssueBy` (String, get) — Gets the logged in username that set the drawing Ready for issue
- `IssuingDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing issuing date.
- `Layout` (LayoutAttributes, get) — Gets the drawing layout attributes.
- `Mark` (String, get) — The drawing mark.
- `ModificationDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing modification date.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — The name of the drawing.
- `OutputDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing output date. XS_DISABLE_DRAWING_PLOT_DATE controls whether this date is set.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
- `SectionViewStartLabel` (String, get) — Gets the drawing attribute for start label of section view
- `Title1` (String, get/set) — The first drawing title.
- `Title2` (String, get/set) — The second drawing title.
- `Title3` (String, get/set) — The third drawing title.
- `UpToDateStatus` (DrawingUpToDateStatus, get) — Gets the drawing up to date status.

## DrawingColors (enum)

The colors used in Tekla.Structures.Drawing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/51916278-1622-9c21-d757-f9f8392746e9)

### Values
- `Invisible` = `152` — The light gray color: the "invisible color". Light gray is visible only on the screen and not in printed or exported drawings.
- `Black` = `153` — The black color.
- `NewLine1` = `154` — The brown color.
- `NewLine2` = `155` — The green color.
- `NewLine3` = `156` — The dark blue color.
- `NewLine4` = `157` — The forest green color.
- `NewLine5` = `158` — The orange color.
- `NewLine6` = `159` — The gray color.
- `Red` = `160` — The red color.
- `Green` = `161` — The bright green color.
- `Blue` = `162` — The blue color.
- `Cyan` = `163` — The turquoise color.
- `Yellow` = `164` — The yellow color.
- `Magenta` = `165` — The magenta color.
- `Gray30` = `130` — The Gray30 rgb(0.3, 0.3, 0.3) color.
- `Gray50` = `131` — The Gray50 rgb(0.5, 0.5, 0.5) color.
- `Gray70` = `132` — The Gray70 rgb(0.7, 0.7, 0.7) color.
- `Gray90` = `133` — The Gray90 rgb(0.9, 0.9, 0.9) color.

## DrawingEnumerator (class)

The DrawingEnumerator class provides the means to iterate through drawing instances. Drawing enumerators are generated by the drawing handler.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8c1e808a-2926-44d1-6bc3-cfb442a77ea6)

### Methods
#### `public IEnumerator GetEnumerator()`

Allows the usage of the foreach statement with DrawingObjectEnumerator.

**Returns:** `IEnumerator` — A pointer to the existing instance of the class.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6d49ab9f-b229-3e1a-f471-83fe41ddd3aa)

#### `public int GetSize()`

Returns the total amout of items.

**Returns:** `Int32` — The total amount of items.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1b1d3fb7-f3cb-3fbe-97f7-19fc5d437b48)

#### `public bool MoveNext()`

Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4f07c4bf-0de8-7040-8a2a-883fb0b8db66)

#### `public void Reset()`

Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8b7ad0a7-646c-0763-6b98-9c49984e0d55)

### Properties
- `Current` (Drawing, get) — Gets the current drawing.

## DrawingEnumeratorBase (class)

The DrawingEnumeratorBase class is a base class for DrawingObjectEnumerator and DrawingEnumerator.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/965d8de8-7450-4374-7000-018074df3b54)

### Methods
#### `public IEnumerator GetEnumerator()`

Allows the usage of the foreach statement with DrawingObjectEnumerator.

**Returns:** `IEnumerator` — A pointer to the existing instance of the class.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6d49ab9f-b229-3e1a-f471-83fe41ddd3aa)

#### `public int GetSize()`

Returns the total amout of items.

**Returns:** `Int32` — The total amount of items.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1b1d3fb7-f3cb-3fbe-97f7-19fc5d437b48)

#### `public bool MoveNext()`

Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4f07c4bf-0de8-7040-8a2a-883fb0b8db66)

#### `public void Reset()`

Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8b7ad0a7-646c-0763-6b98-9c49984e0d55)

### Properties
- `AutoFetch` (Boolean, get/set) — Indicates that the objects are fetched from the drawing when the enumerator is created. Object information is therefore not anymore fetched when 'Current' item is asked from the enumerator. Property value is used for all enumerators in application

## DrawingHandler (class)

The DrawingHandler class initializes the interface from a .NET application to Tekla Structures. This object must be created before any actions can be performed on Tekla Structures drawings. When this object is created, it is possible to ask the current active drawing in Tekla Structures, get a list of drawings or create a new drawing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/99085c56-78ab-d559-3ae6-e0cae84b3742)

### Constructors
- `public DrawingHandler()` — Creates a new drawing handler instance, a "handle" to Tekla.Structures.Drawing. When a drawing handler object is created, it is possible to ask the current active drawing in Tekla Structures, get a list of drawings or create a new drawing.

### Methods
#### `public bool CloseActiveDrawing()`

Closes the drawing editor.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/28a51c2a-f66c-7516-857a-c28c7e8c0737)

#### `public bool CloseActiveDrawing(bool save)`

Closes the drawing editor.

**Parameters:**
- `save` (System.Boolean) — Whether the active drawing should be saved on close.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/3b137222-7773-704a-d875-fbdbb1257ca6)

#### `public Drawing GetActiveDrawing()`

Returns an instance of the active drawing that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

**Returns:** `Drawing` — The drawing that is open in Tekla Structures or null if no drawing is open.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/b81bdfd4-7251-6dd2-3220-840143e6cbbf)

#### `public bool GetConnectionStatus()`

Returns true if a proper connection to the Tekla Structures process has been established. A proper connection to Tekla Stuctures in the drawing API needs Tekla Structures up and running and a model open. Currently, there's no way to re-establish the connection.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/0f81f45b-d947-0af9-7dcd-5f808f6b77a1)

#### `public DrawingObjectSelector GetDrawingObjectSelector()`

Gets a drawing object selector. With a drawing object selector drawing objects can be selected and highlighted in the drawing editor. A drawing object selector also provides a list of currently selected drawing objects.

**Returns:** `DrawingObjectSelector` — The drawing object selector for the current drawing. Null if no drawing is active.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/697aadf2-9bb6-4f35-f6a7-ad6f07afb121)

#### `public DrawingSelector GetDrawingSelector()`

Gets a drawing selector. With a drawing selector the list of selected drawings can be gotten.

**Returns:** `DrawingSelector` — The drawing selector.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/0d2838dc-fc44-9ca6-1160-9199c9a61c86)

#### `public DrawingEnumerator GetDrawings()`

Gets all the drawings from the database.

**Returns:** `DrawingEnumerator` — All the drawings from the database.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/168596db-1134-c430-5061-c5e7bfd74137)

#### `[ObsoleteAttribute("GetMessageExecutionStatus is obsolete and defaults always to BY_COMMIT.", false)] public static DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum GetMessageExecutionStatus()`

Gets the current message execution mode for the application.

**Returns:** `DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum` — The current message execution mode.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/98f090d6-61bf-b7c3-e882-8ce74bfb4e94)

#### `public List<Identifier> GetModelObjectIdentifiers(Drawing drawing)`

Gets model object identifiers of the drawing.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing where objects are fetched.

**Returns:** `List<Identifier>` — List of model object identifiers in the drawing.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/10273ee5-31be-5058-48b0-b54a684f60e7)

#### `public Picker GetPicker()`

Gets a picker for picking points and objects in a drawing.

**Returns:** `Picker` — A picker object if the drawing editor is open. Otherwise null.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4f0314ad-dfb2-e486-4936-0fb4e680e628)

#### `public bool IsAnyDrawingOpen()`

Returns information if any drawing is open.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if a drawing is open or false if no drawing is open.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/bc85671d-e8ca-5537-83a4-251f188816e0)

#### `public bool IssueDrawing(Drawing drawing)`

Issues the drawing if the drawing is not issued or was previously issued but has been modified since. This is the same as pressing Issue on the drawing list for a selected drawing.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be issued.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/c3d672fd-1551-264f-6ef0-845fb7c0ed8f)

#### `public bool PrintDrawing(Drawing drawing, DPMPrinterAttributes printAttributes)`

Prints the drawing using the given printer attributes.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DPMPrinterAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/794a682c-1c9e-09e2-61a9-a190a3c6a7a0)

#### `public bool PrintDrawing(Drawing drawing, DPMPrinterAttributes printAttributes, string outputFile)`

Prints the drawing to file using the given printer attributes and name of the output file. The given output file overrides the printer attributes file settings.

**Remarks:** If there is an active drawing visible in the drawing editor and it is a different drawing to the specified drawing, the active drawing will be closed.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DPMPrinterAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.
- `outputFile` (System.String) — The print output file name.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/9892c982-a3a0-7c7f-be45-d0c0ecf5e011)

#### `public bool PrintDrawing(Drawing drawing, PrintAttributes printAttributes)`

Prints the drawing using the given printer instance. NOTE! The drawing cannot be active, otherwise printing fails.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.PrintAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6d90ef48-e76c-7b90-97ea-f0f0305f356f)

#### `public bool PrintDrawing(Drawing drawing, PrintAttributes printAttributes, string fileName)`

Prints the drawing to file using the given printer instance. NOTE! The drawing cannot be active, otherwise printing fails.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.PrintAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.
- `fileName` (System.String) — The name of the output file.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8769190b-de6e-2268-846a-3fe3ccbfc6f1)

#### `public bool PrintDrawings(IEnumerable<Drawing> drawings, DPMPrinterAttributes printAttributes, string OutputFolder)`

Prints the list of drawings using the given printer attributes.

**Remarks:** If there is an active drawing visible in the drawing editor and it is a different drawing to the specified drawings, the active drawing will be closed.

**Parameters:**
- `drawings` (System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Drawing>) — The list of drawings to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DPMPrinterAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.
- `OutputFolder` (System.String) — The output folder as an absolute path or relateive to the model folder.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/18cfb3c1-0804-3486-ae62-da6e8a3c357e)

#### `public bool PrintDrawings(List<Drawing> drawings, DPMPrinterAttributes printAttributes)`

Prints the list of drawings using the given printer attributes.

**Remarks:** If there is an active drawing visible in the drawing editor and it is a different drawing to the specified drawings, the active drawing will be closed.

**Parameters:**
- `drawings` (System.Collections.Generic.List<Drawing>) — The list of drawings to be printed.
- `printAttributes` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DPMPrinterAttributes) — The print attributes for the print job.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success, false if printing fails.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8bbf61cb-24e0-da11-a4ba-e187133b4c55)

#### `public bool SaveActiveDrawing()`

Saves the currently open drawing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/22861cc2-b284-efde-02ff-824947336e92)

#### `public bool SetActiveDrawing(Drawing drawing)`

Sets the active drawing that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be set as the active drawing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/3dab6952-0b6b-9b3a-9d77-48c406290215)

#### `public bool SetActiveDrawing(Drawing drawing, bool showDrawing)`

Sets the active drawing that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be set as the active drawing.
- `showDrawing` (System.Boolean) — Whether to open the drawing as visible or in the background (faster).

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/11e9c711-1f1d-a057-d26b-abec310ddafe)

#### `public bool SetActiveDrawing(Drawing drawing, bool showDrawing, bool forceOpen)`

Sets the active drawing that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be set as the active drawing.
- `showDrawing` (System.Boolean) — Whether to open the drawing as visible or in the background (faster).
- `forceOpen` (System.Boolean) — Force to open the drawing even if it is not up to date. showDrawing needs to be set to false to be able to use forceOpen

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/106a2ced-348c-3323-21f7-61ffff722d8c)

#### `[ObsoleteAttribute("SetMessageExecutionStatus is obsolete and ignored. Message is ignored. MessageExecutionStatus always defaults to BY_COMMIT.", false)] public static DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum SetMessageExecutionStatus(DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum mode)`

Sets the message execution mode for the application.

**Parameters:**
- `mode` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum) — The new mode.

**Returns:** `DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum` — The old message execution mode.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/588ddcdb-534e-5cd4-3069-1cdb2f8a20f9)

#### `public bool UnissueDrawing(Drawing drawing)`

Unissues the drawing. This is the same as pressing Unissue on the drawing list for a selected drawing.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be unissued.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/fa82a99e-ce89-e906-6d43-28e189ed48d3)

#### `public bool UpdateDrawing(Drawing drawing)`

Updates the drawing. This is the same as pressing Update on the drawing list for a selected drawing. NOTE! The drawing cannot be active, otherwise the operation fails. NOTE! Numbering must be executed before this operation.

**Parameters:**
- `drawing` (Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Drawing) — The drawing to be updated.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/e6815606-40e5-189f-d6c1-5192dc16f9ad)

## DrawingHandler.MessageExecutionModeEnum (enum)

The message execution modes of Tekla Structures.

**Remarks:** The message execution mode of Tekla Structures controls whether messages are executed after each database operation or by an explicit call to execute messages.There may be some speed benefits if the BY_COMMIT mode is used when inserting a lot of objects. The messages are then executed once after the objects have been inserted.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/d857408b-12df-e503-3481-cbed0e9cc540)

### Values
- `INSTANT` = `0` — Executes messages after each database operation. All objects appear instantly on the screen when using the INSTANT mode.
- `BY_COMMIT` = `1` — Executes messages only when Drawing.CommitChanges() is called.

## DrawingHatchColors (enum)

The hatch colors used in Tekla.Structures.Drawing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/e2841abe-9fbd-c6ae-74c1-c88b193cd767)

### Values
- `Invisible` = `152` — The light gray color: the "invisible color". Light gray is visible only on the screen and not in printed or exported drawings.
- `Black` = `153` — The black color.
- `NewLine1` = `154` — The brown color.
- `NewLine2` = `155` — The green color.
- `NewLine3` = `156` — The dark blue color.
- `NewLine4` = `157` — The forest green color.
- `NewLine5` = `158` — The orange color.
- `NewLine6` = `159` — The gray color.
- `Red` = `160` — The red color.
- `Green` = `161` — The bright green color.
- `Blue` = `162` — The blue color.
- `Cyan` = `163` — The turquoise color.
- `Yellow` = `164` — The yellow color.
- `Magenta` = `165` — The magenta color.
- `Special` = `120` — Obsolete. The special color (deprecated). Defined with advanced options XS_HATCH_SPECIAL_COLOR_R, XS_HATCH_SPECIAL_COLOR_G and XS_HATCH_SPECIAL_COLOR_B.
- `Gray30` = `130` — The Gray30 rgb(0.3, 0.3, 0.3) color.
- `Gray50` = `131` — The Gray50 rgb(0.5, 0.5, 0.5) color.
- `Gray70` = `132` — The Gray70 rgb(0.7, 0.7, 0.7) color.
- `Gray90` = `133` — The Gray90 rgb(0.9, 0.9, 0.9) color.

## DrawingLink (class)

The DrawingLink class defines a drawing link object in a drawing. When a drawing link is double clicked, the target drawing is opened.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/d0fdf906-a890-dba2-03a8-7209a743f5ea)

### Constructors
- `public DrawingLink(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Drawing Target, string Text)` — Creates a new drawing link instance using standard attributes.
- `public DrawingLink(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Drawing Target, string Text, LinkAttributes Attributes)` — Creates a new drawing link instance using the given attributes.
- `public DrawingLink(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Drawing Target, string Text, Size Size)` — Creates a new drawing link instance of the given size.
- `public DrawingLink(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Drawing Target, string Text, Size Size, LinkAttributes Attributes)` — Creates a new drawing link instance of the given size.

### Methods
#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the link.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/707bfed6-0ca4-cee2-cab5-335cb191a0fb)

#### `public RectangleBoundingBox GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox()`

Gets the bounding box for the current object in the global axis coordinate system.

**Returns:** `RectangleBoundingBox` — A rectangle bounding box for the current object.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/992fb6af-b657-ed89-b5bf-9a8f8854710a)

#### `public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)`

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Double>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/b25f0e6b-ab5c-154a-a45c-4f5868a20599)

#### `public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, double> values)`

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `names` (System.Collections.Generic.List<String>) — List of names to get the values for.
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Double>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/7f327fc5-14b5-f534-da39-b68d3f87124a)

#### `public Drawing GetDrawing()`

Gets the drawing where the drawing object is.

**Returns:** `Drawing` — The drawing where the drawing object is.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4e9beef3-2188-ab45-9f07-dbde351915bf)

#### `public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, int> values)`

Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Int32>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

### Properties
- `Angle` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the angle of the link.
- `Attributes` (LinkAttributes, get/set) — Gets or sets the link attributes.
- `InsertionPoint` (Point, get/set) — Gets or sets the insertion point of the link.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
- `Target` (Drawing, get/set) — Gets or sets the target drawing.
- `Text` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the link text that is visible on the screen.

## DrawingObject (class)

The DrawingObject class is an abstract base class for all the objects in the drawing. All drawing objects have a database identifier and belong to some view.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/2056df24-dbe8-2cf2-1342-1a13dc0ccacd)

### Methods

## DrawingObject.NoAttributes (class)

The NoAttributes class defines attributes for objects that do not contain any attributes.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/7227e500-8f42-5762-0143-d3eaf00e8c77)

### Constructors
- `public NoAttributes()` — Creates a new default no attributes instance.
- `public NoAttributes(string AttributeFile)` — Creates a new no attributes instance. No attributes are loaded from the attribute file as it is not possible to load attributes for objects of this type.

### Methods
#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8cab66ba-5115-4e23-78e2-6e663ff74211)

#### `public override bool LoadAttributes(string AttributeFile)`

It is not possible to load attributes for objects of this type because the objects have no attributes.

**Parameters:**
- `AttributeFile` (System.String) — The filename of the attribute file.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — False because it is not possible to load attributes.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6c1c9d6b-ed8f-13d0-5f6d-6564881fc82c)

## DrawingObjectEnumerator (class)

The DrawingObjectEnumerator class provides the means to iterate through drawing object instances. Drawing object enumerators are generated by the container view and they contain drawing objects that are children of the container view instance.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/98a25b0f-b809-6c62-1499-f5ebc6cfc72a)

### Methods
#### `public IEnumerator GetEnumerator()`

Allows the usage of the foreach statement with DrawingObjectEnumerator.

**Returns:** `IEnumerator` — A pointer to the existing instance of the class.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/6d49ab9f-b229-3e1a-f471-83fe41ddd3aa)

#### `public int GetSize()`

Returns the total amout of items.

**Returns:** `Int32` — The total amount of items.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1b1d3fb7-f3cb-3fbe-97f7-19fc5d437b48)

#### `public bool MoveNext()`

Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4f07c4bf-0de8-7040-8a2a-883fb0b8db66)

#### `public void Reset()`

Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8b7ad0a7-646c-0763-6b98-9c49984e0d55)

### Properties
- `Current` (DrawingObject, get) — Gets the current drawing object.

## DrawingUpToDateStatus (enum)

The drawing up to date status.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f3ce4eac-1589-801a-b1e2-5009757ab10f)

### Values
- `DrawingIsUpToDate` = `1` — The drawing is up to date.
- `PartsWereModified` = `2` — Some parts in the drawing were modified since the last update.
- `DrawingIsUpToDateButMayNeedChecking` = `4` — The drawing is up to date but may need checking.
- `IncludedDrawingModified` = `5` — The included drawing was modified.
- `OriginalPartDeleted` = `6` — The original part from which the drawing was created was deleted since the last update.
- `AllPartsDeleted` = `7` — All parts were deleted.
- `NumberOfPartsInNumberingSeriesIncreased` = `8` — The number of parts in the numbering series has increased since the last update.
- `NumberOfPartsInNumberingSeriesDecreased` = `9` — The number of parts in the numbering series has decreased since the last update.
- `DrawingWasCloned` = `10` — The drawing was cloned from another drawing.
- `DrawingWasUpdated` = `11` — The drawing was updated.
- `CopiedViewChanged` = `12` — The copied view changed.
- `DrawingWasSplitted` = `13` — The drawing was splitted (cloned) during numbering.
- `MovedViewDeleted` = `14` — The moved view was deleted.
- `MovedViewLabelChanged` = `15` — The moved view symbol has changed.
- `DrawingWasClonedFromCloud` = `16` — The drawing was cloned from another drawing in cloud service.

## DwgObject (class)

The DwgObject class defines a DWG or DXF object that can be inserted into a drawing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/13e76fb2-edc3-613b-0827-af240fe12df6)

### Constructors
- `public DwgObject(ViewBase view, Point insertionPoint, string fileName)` — Creates a new DwgObject instance with the given parameters.
- `public DwgObject(ViewBase view, Point insertionPoint, string fileName, EmbeddedObjectAttributes attributes)` — Creates a new DwgObject instance using the specified attributes.
- `public DwgObject(ViewBase view, Point insertionPoint, Size frameSize, string fileName)` — Creates a new DwgObject instance with the given parameters.
- `public DwgObject(ViewBase view, Point insertionPoint, Size frameSize, string fileName, EmbeddedObjectAttributes attributes)` — Creates a new DwgObject instance using the specified attributes.

### Methods
#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the embedded object.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/5dc2f662-fa9f-431d-d6c4-c8b9fd7cb063)

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/92532071-8507-973e-5e7c-303633870edc)

#### `public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)`

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**

### Properties
- `Angle` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the angle (in degrees).
- `Attributes` (EmbeddedObjectAttributes, get/set) — Gets or sets the attributes.
- `FileName` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the file name defining the embedded object.
- `InsertionPoint` (Point, get/set) — Gets or sets the insertion point.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
- `Size` (Size, get/set) — Gets or sets the size of the frame of the embedded object.

## EdgeChamfer (class)

The EdgeChamfer class contains methods related to edge chamfers. An edge chamfer is a drawing object derived from a model object. It represents a drawing chamfer that has a reference to the actual chamfer in the model database.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f7f0a579-7515-055a-d571-f5450caf7d20)

### Methods

### Properties
- `Attributes` (EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes, get/set) — The attributes of the edge chamfer. For more information see EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes.
- `Hideable` (Hideable, get) — Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.
- `ModelIdentifier` (Identifier, get) — The database identifier of the model object in the model database. By using this identifier, it is possible to select the actual object in the Tekla Structures model.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

## EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes (class)

The EdgeChamferAttributes class is the attributes class for the edge chamfer.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/21329c5d-35e7-6835-32de-03df1084b0a0)

### Constructors
- `public EdgeChamferAttributes()` — Creates a new default edge chamfer attributes instance that loads standard attributes.
- `public EdgeChamferAttributes(string AttributeFile)` — Creates a new edge chamfer attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

### Methods
#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/0788720f-031d-788b-92e8-a85d95a2701c)

#### `public override bool LoadAttributes(string AttributeFile)`

Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

**Parameters:**
- `AttributeFile` (System.String) — The filename of the attribute file.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/96a9aab9-8841-803d-8bc5-7c0688350dff)

### Properties
- `VisibleLines` (LineTypeAttributes, get/set) — The line type of the chamfer.

## ElementBase (class)

The ElementBase class is the abstract base class for all mark elements.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/912b7474-052f-6236-b82b-fee837c57e62)

### Methods
#### `public abstract Object Clone()`

**Returns:** `Object` — A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/020dbce5-3810-0ebb-8cc3-66b14d32d46c)

Returns the content as a string without formatting.

**Returns:** `String` — The content as a string without formatting.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/813c9266-4b18-84d8-87fd-205f9178ec3e)

#### `public abstract bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with the given object. Checks every field of both objects for equality.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — An object of the same type to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the field values of both objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/85182d02-6b31-f730-dfbb-ee91936b7d42)

## EmbeddedObjectAttributes (class)

The EmbeddedObjectAttributes class contains attributes for embedded objects.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/596ae9f6-fcde-e827-a806-61f33418be18)

### Constructors
- `public EmbeddedObjectAttributes()` — Initializes a new instance of the EmbeddedObjectAttributes class that loads standard attributes.
- `public EmbeddedObjectAttributes(string AttributeFile)` — Initializes a new instance of the EmbeddedObjectAttributes class that loads given attributes.

### Methods
#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f8df975c-3c1c-23b9-96cb-2bfe8ae31ac6)

#### `public override bool LoadAttributes(string AttributeFile)`

Loads the specified attribute file.

**Parameters:**
- `AttributeFile` (System.String) — The name of the attribute file.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if succeeded.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/27635ad9-d4d6-ad93-a827-16cb3992936c)

### Properties
- `Frame` (EmbeddedObjectFrame, get/set) — Gets or sets the frame.
- `Scaling` (EmbeddedObjectScalingOptions, get/set) — Gets or sets the scaling type.
- `XScale` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the X scaling value. Changing this property will set the scaling type to ScaleXY.
- `YScale` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the Y scaling value. Changing this property will set the scaling type to ScaleXY.

## EmbeddedObjectBase (class)

The EmbeddedObjectBase class defines an embedded object in a drawing. The object refers to another file in the file system and its drawing representation is updated when a drawing is opened.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/06a56769-d7c5-f846-e1fd-eca7788d10ca)

### Properties
- `Angle` (Double, get/set) — Gets or sets the angle (in degrees).
- `Attributes` (EmbeddedObjectAttributes, get/set) — Gets or sets the attributes.
- `FileName` (String, get/set) — Gets or sets the file name defining the embedded object.
- `InsertionPoint` (Point, get/set) — Gets or sets the insertion point.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
- `Size` (Size, get/set) — Gets or sets the size of the frame of the embedded object.

## EmbeddedObjectFrame (class)

The EmbeddedObjectFrame class defines the frame object for embedded objects.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/69279c2a-ae72-e8eb-62dc-ad7dbe3cc0d3)

### Constructors
- `public EmbeddedObjectFrame(LineTypes LineType, DrawingColors FrameColor)` — Creates a new embedded object frame instance with the specified line type and color.
- `public EmbeddedObjectFrame(LineTypes LineType, TeklaDrawingColor FrameColor)` — Creates a new embedded object frame instance with the specified line type and user defined RGB color.

### Methods
#### `public RectangleBoundingBox GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox()`

Returns the bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

**Returns:** `RectangleBoundingBox` — The bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/3d004ed7-9902-c6c8-6805-4c056268a763)

#### `public RectangleBoundingBox GetObjectAlignedBoundingBox()`

Returns the bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

**Returns:** `RectangleBoundingBox` — The bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/c896a504-9410-e2c9-bbda-c8d671479c0b)

#### `public bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1182e099-00d7-f716-55c6-ebdb3397cbba)

### Properties
- `Color` (DrawingColors, get/set) — Obsolete.
- `Line` (LineTypeAttributes, get/set) — Gets or sets the line type of the frame.
- `LineType` (LineTypes, get/set) — Obsolete.
- `Type` (FrameTypes, get) — Gets the frame type (rectangular).

## EmbeddedObjectScalingOptions (enum)

The options for controlling the scaling of the objects in the drawing.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/795b7d71-f3a0-1d23-342f-a65be670084e)

### Values
- `ScaleX` = `1` — Scales the object in the X direction.
- `ScaleXY` = `3` — Scales the object in the X and Y directions.
- `ScaleToFit` = `4` — Scales the object to fit in the frame in the Y direction.
- `ScaleBestFit` = `8` — The object is scaled inside the frame, still maintaining its original aspect ratio.

## Events (class)

The Events class allows the user to register event listeners for drawing events.

**Remarks:** Asynchronous event handling Registered event handlers are called asynchronously so that many handlers may be running simultaneously. Event handlers are not guaranteed to be run in the same thread where they were registered. The asynchronous nature of the events requires the use of synchronization constructs on objects and data structures that are not defined to be thread safe.Microsoft's documentation about the lock statement: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/c5kehkcz.aspxMicrosoft's documentation about delegates: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/900fyy8e.aspxMicrosoft's documentation about managed threading: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/1c9txz50.aspx

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/70b96e37-c90a-f11f-1554-a4bf7c4147e4)

### Constructors
- `public Events()` — Constructs a new instance of Events.

### Methods
#### `public void Dispose()`

Disposes of the Events instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4d79d261-bcf1-d034-f6d8-6c413402a2a8)

#### `public override Object InitializeLifetimeService()`

Initializes the lifetime service.

**Returns:** `Object` — Always null.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/d68de3c6-70b9-635e-aeef-074e2c0ee453)

#### `public void Register()`

Registers the instance to listen to the specified events.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/b196e5b4-cac8-a0dd-94f3-2f351076174a)

#### `public void UnRegister()`

Unregisters the instance from listening to events.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/aaab4b70-a62a-2f51-bca6-3926ab0b156b)

### Events
#### `DrawingChanged` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingStatusChangedDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingStatusChangedDelegate DrawingChanged`

The DrawingChanged event is raised when the drawing has been changed and the database is committed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/5fbe8494-e106-fdcc-720a-a513e1d87046)

#### `DrawingDeleted` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingDeletedDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingDeletedDelegate DrawingDeleted`

The DrawingDeleted event is raised when a drawing has been deleted.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/3a3213f5-aa9f-9c69-5263-4d36fb12851b)

#### `DrawingInserted` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingInsertedDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingInsertedDelegate DrawingInserted`

The DrawingInserted event is raised when a drawing has been inserted.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/735b2e7d-95df-fb8a-a7aa-ce30800afa0b)

#### `DrawingReadyForIssuingChange` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingReadyForIssuingChangeDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingReadyForIssuingChangeDelegate DrawingReadyForIssuingChange`

The DrawingReadyForIssuingChange event is raised just after a drawing is marked or unmarked ready for issuing.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/ea59f224-4b9c-d9b2-ecb9-3e333a3a6cbe)

#### `DrawingStatusChanged` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingStatusChangedDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingStatusChangedDelegate DrawingStatusChanged`

The DrawingStatusChanged event is raised when the drawing status has changed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/9006d864-225b-0144-4e0e-88c243fe1224)

#### `DrawingUpdated` (`Tekla.Structures.Drawing.Events.DrawingUpdatedDelegate`)

**Signature:** `public event Events.DrawingUpdatedDelegate DrawingUpdated`

The DrawingUpdated event is raised when the drawing has been inserted, deleted or modified, and the database is committed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/7b3864f6-9c92-e5d7-e611-eadcc58ae121)

## FontAttributes (class)

The FontAttributes class contains the basic attributes for fonts.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f0ae6595-19c8-88da-371c-e104b7d07388)

### Constructors
- `public FontAttributes()` — Creates a new font attributes instance. The default color is black, the height is 2.5, the font name is Arial and the values of italic and bold are false.
- `public FontAttributes(DrawingColors color, double height, string fontName, bool italic, bool bold)` — Creates a new font attributes instance with the given parameters.
- `public FontAttributes(TeklaDrawingColor color, double height, string fontName, bool italic, bool bold)` — Creates a new font attributes instance with the given parameters.

### Methods
#### `public Object Clone()`

Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

**Returns:** `Object` — A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8b7bcbf8-c379-13d6-9c02-0043bde2fbc4)

#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/e240af18-28a0-7eba-1bff-de03c0f16c47)

### Properties
- `Bold` (Boolean, get/set) — Whether the font is bold.
- `Color` (DrawingColors, get/set) — The color of the font.
- `Height` (Double, get/set) — The height of the font (in millimeters).
- `Italic` (Boolean, get/set) — Whether the font is italic.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — The name of the font.
- `TrueColor` (TeklaDrawingColor, get/set) — The true color (rgb enabled) of the font.

## FormatTypes (enum)

The available format types.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/ce6c34a2-171f-aad5-b117-917f18799552)

### Values
- `Automatic` = `0` — Automatic, chooses the most appropriate format for the current environment.
- `WholeNumber` = `1` — As shown on the dialog: ###. This format will not show fractions or decimals.
- `OneDecimalIfValidDecimal` = `2` — As shown on the dialog: ###.[#]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.
- `OneDecimal` = `3` — As shown on the dialog: ###.#. This format will always show the value with one decimal.
- `TwoDecimalsIfValidDecimals` = `4` — As shown on the dialog: ###.[##]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.
- `TwoDecimals` = `5` — As shown on the dialog: ###.##. This format will always show the value with two decimals.
- `ThreeDecimalsIfValidDecimals` = `6` — As shown on the dialog: ###.[###]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.
- `ThreeDecimals` = `7` — As shown on the dialog: ###.###. This format will always show the value with three decimals.
- `Fractional` = `8` — As shown on the dialog: ### #/#. This format will always show the value with fractions.

## Frame (class)

The Frame class defines a frame that can be given to objects, including texts. A frame is a box around the object. You can specify the color and shape of the box.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/f031cc4a-bd67-e91d-c143-8fdc4c580b35)

### Constructors
- `public Frame(FrameTypes FrameType, DrawingColors FrameColor)` — Creates a new frame instance with the specified frame type and color.
- `public Frame(FrameTypes FrameType, TeklaDrawingColor FrameColor)` — Creates a new frame instance with the specified frame type and RGB color.

### Methods
#### `public Object Clone()`

Clones the object.

**Returns:** `Object` — A copy of the object.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/443b9742-2894-2ba3-92a8-0889c193cd2b)

#### `public RectangleBoundingBox GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox()`

Returns the bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

**Returns:** `RectangleBoundingBox` — The bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/26c9ea8e-b0f0-2043-4f8e-87b9af27d476)

#### `public RectangleBoundingBox GetObjectAlignedBoundingBox()`

Returns the bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

**Returns:** `RectangleBoundingBox` — The bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/9b7d3ea6-fe6a-1e44-1b7d-8545ffc17e94)

#### `public bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/867b0d3f-25bd-f1c4-a8b8-16f9b77c3cd1)

### Properties
- `Color` (DrawingColors, get/set) — The frame's color.
- `TrueColor` (TeklaDrawingColor, get/set) — The true color (RGB enabled) of the frame.
- `Type` (FrameTypes, get/set) — The frame's type (square, round, dashed...).

## FrameTypes (enum)

The available frame styles around the object.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/a054014a-abc5-d549-300d-00be30967f5e)

### Values
- `None` = `0` — No frame.
- `Rectangular` = `1` — The rectangular frame.
- `Line` = `2` — A line under the object.
- `Round` = `3` — The frame with rounded ends.
- `Circle` = `4` — The circular frame.
- `Diamond` = `5` — The frame looking like a diamond.
- `Hexagon` = `6` — The hexagonally shaped frame.
- `Triangle` = `7` — The triangular frame.
- `Sharpened` = `8` — The frame with sharpened ends.

## GADrawing (class)

The GADrawing class is for handling general arrangement drawings in Tekla Structures.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/fde93858-3caf-30b8-9473-62392b72a083)

### Constructors
- `public GADrawing()` — Instantiates a new GA drawing using standard attributes.
- `public GADrawing(string AttributeFile)` — Instantiates a new GA drawing with the given attributes.
- `public GADrawing(string Name, string AttributeFile)` — Instantiates a new GA drawing with the given name and attribute file.
- `public GADrawing(string AttributeFile, Size SheetSize)` — Instantiates a new GA drawing with attributes. Loads the specified attribute file and overrides with the given layout attributes.

### Methods
#### `public bool CommitChanges()`

Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/bc26a611-bd6a-535a-4461-943b8bf5351c)

#### `public bool CommitChanges(string Message)`

Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

**Parameters:**
- `Message` (System.String) — The message to be saved with the commit.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/92109855-5313-7446-bef4-ab6dde6875f1)

#### `public override bool Delete()`

Deletes the drawing. An active drawing cannot be deleted.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4bcff604-27c4-487f-bb7d-5d80a2d87d8b)

Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

**Parameters:**
- `values` (System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<String,Double>.) — Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

Inserts an empty general arrangement drawing. Views must be added separately. A drawing can be inserted only when there is no active drawing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the objects are referencing the same database object.

#### `public override bool Modify()`

Applies the changes made to the drawing attributes.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/5907ed8e-4fb4-9aff-c374-6bf3b73fb003)

#### `public bool PlaceViews()`

Places views on the sheet. Computes the required size of the views to fit the parts, then places the views so that they fit on the sheet and do not overlap. Adjusts the sheet size if needed.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True on success.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1e1578e4-084f-21a9-3d1a-2b03140440ce)

Selects the drawing.

Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.Double) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/995715f7-c86c-86d0-359f-76dc4d14197a)

#### `public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)`

Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.Int32) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/88a5c4aa-fb12-e341-ee9e-fcd3284fab68)

#### `public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)`

Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

**Parameters:**
- `Name` (System.String) — The name of the property to be set.
- `Value` (System.String) — The new value for the property.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the property was set successfully.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/633cfaf7-22e7-1bb1-6596-053d78749c52)

### Properties
- `CommitMessage` (String, get) — Gets the commit message
- `CreationDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing creation date.
- `DrawingTypeStr` (String, get) — The type of the drawing
- `IsFrozen` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is frozen.
- `IsIssued` (Boolean, get) — Describes whether the drawing is issued.
- `IsIssuedButModified` (Boolean, get) — Describes whether the drawing is issued but modified since it was issued.
- `IsLocked` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is locked.
- `IsLockedBy` (String, get) — Gets the logged in username that set the drawing to locked
- `IsMasterDrawing` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is a master drawing (shown with a special symbol on the drawing list).
- `IsReadyForIssue` (Boolean, get/set) — Describes whether the drawing is ready for issue.
- `IsReadyForIssueBy` (String, get) — Gets the logged in username that set the drawing Ready for issue
- `IssuingDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing issuing date.
- `Layout` (LayoutAttributes, get) — Gets the drawing layout attributes.
- `Mark` (String, get) — The drawing mark.
- `ModificationDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing modification date.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — The name of the drawing.
- `OutputDate` (DateTime, get) — The drawing output date. XS_DISABLE_DRAWING_PLOT_DATE controls whether this date is set.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
- `SectionViewStartLabel` (String, get) — Gets the drawing attribute for start label of section view
- `Title1` (String, get/set) — The first drawing title.
- `Title2` (String, get/set) — The second drawing title.
- `Title3` (String, get/set) — The third drawing title.
- `UpToDateStatus` (DrawingUpToDateStatus, get) — Gets the drawing up to date status.

## GenericAttributesBase (class)

The GenericAttributesBase class is a base class that shared attributes among many classes use.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/07cd6d10-6a6c-93d8-9f20-1f82869159fe)

### Methods
#### `public abstract bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/1fc87d83-33b8-7e4e-7803-dda26a0aa35a)

## GraphicObject (class)

The GraphicObject class is the abstract base class for all graphic objects (the arc, the circle, the cloud, the line, the polygon, the polyline and the rectangle).

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/3e9d2a0d-5def-596a-819a-77a9515b447d)

## GraphicObject.GraphicObjectAttributes (class)

The GraphicObjectAttributes class is the attributes class of the graphic object.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/769dd789-cb81-512f-c2da-32d369b422ad)

### Constructors
- `public GraphicObjectAttributes()` — Creates a new graphic object attributes instance.
- `public GraphicObjectAttributes(string AttributeFile)` — Creates a new graphic object attributes instance using the given attribute file's filename.

### Methods
#### `public abstract bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/da11fa4f-a98d-c770-d0e2-f458bc3b82dc)

#### `public abstract bool LoadAttributes(string AttributeFile)`

Loads the attributes from the specified file.

**Parameters:**
- `AttributeFile` (System.String) — The filename of the attribute file. Use only the filename, not the extension.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/5597a575-45e2-aa83-6576-390f23af3e48)

### Properties
- `Line` (LineTypeAttributes, get/set) — The line attributes of the graphic object. A graphic object always consists of lines.

## GraphicObjectHatchAttributes (class)

The GraphicObjectHatchAttributes class contains hatch attributes for graphic object hatches.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/20d326bf-d289-3d7a-92e3-2f88973713fd)

### Methods
#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/42743022-d347-9ac1-942e-7a6990e9bb83)

### Properties
- `Angle` (Double, get/set) — The angle in which to draw the hatch.
- `BackgroundColor` (DrawingHatchColors, get/set) — The background color of the hatch.
- `Color` (DrawingHatchColors, get/set) — The color of the hatch.
- `DrawBackgroundColor` (Boolean, get/set) — Sets whether the background color will be enabled or disabled for the hatch. See also: BackgroundColor.
- `FactorType` (Int32, get/set) — The type of the hatch factor.
- `Name` (String, get/set) — The name of the hatch. If an empty string is given as hatch name it will become "None".
- `OffsetX` (Double, get/set) — The offset from the origin in the X-direction.
- `OffsetY` (Double, get/set) — The offset from the origin in the Y-direction.
- `ScaleX` (Double, get/set) — The scale value of the hatch in the X-direction.
- `ScaleY` (Double, get/set) — The scale value of the hatch in the Y-direction.
- `TrueBackgroundColor` (TeklaDrawingColor, get/set) — The true color (rgb enabled) of the hatch background.
- `TrueColor` (TeklaDrawingColor, get/set) — The true color (RGB enabled) of the hatch.

## Grid (class)

The Grid class contains methods related to grids. A drawing grid is inserted/removed using the view.

### Properties
- `Attributes` (Grid.GridAttributes, get/set) — The attributes of the grid. For more information see Grid.GridAttributes.
- `Hideable` (Hideable, get) — Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.
- `ModelIdentifier` (Identifier, get) — The database identifier of the model object in the model database. By using this identifier, it is possible to select the actual object in the Tekla Structures model.
- `QueryReturnValue` (ReturnValuesEnum, get/set) — Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

## Grid.GridAttributes (class)

The GridAttributes class is the attributes class for the grid.

[Vendor docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/4d60e400-344e-9cc9-f842-f5c9abd32819)

### Constructors
- `public GridAttributes()` — Creates a new default grid attributes instance that loads standard attributes.
- `public GridAttributes(string AttributesFile)` — Creates a new grid attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

### Methods
#### `public override bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)`

Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

**Parameters:**
- `ObjectToCompare` (System.Object) — The object to be used for comparing.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/8c08ec6f-c6cd-22d9-ece4-8f6dca8a1339)

#### `public override bool LoadAttributes(string AttributeFile)`

Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

**Parameters:**
- `AttributeFile` (System.String) — The filename of the attribute file.

**Returns:** `Boolean` — True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

[Docs](https://developer.tekla.com/topic/en/18/43/edf66ccf-da28-90ec-e685-81c2a4649c9a)

### Properties
- `DrawOnlyTextLabelsNotGrids` (Boolean, get/set) — Set as true if you don't want to draw the grids, only show the grids' text labels.
- `DrawTextAtBottomOfGrid` (Boolean, get/set) — Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the bottom of the grid.
- `DrawTextAtLeftOfGrid` (Boolean, get/set) — Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the left of the grid.
- `DrawTextAtRightOfGrid` (Boolean, get/set) — Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the right of the grid.
- `DrawTextAtTopOfGrid` (Boolean, get/set) — Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the top of the grid.
- `Font` (FontAttributes, get/set) — The grid's font attributes.
- `Frame` (Frame, get/set) — The frame attributes of the grid's labels.
- `Line` (LineTypeAttributes, get/set) — The grid's line attributes.
- `OffsetAtEndOfLine` (Double, get/set) — The offset for the end of the grid lines.
- `OffsetAtStartOfLine` (Double, get/set) — The offset for the beginning of the grid lines.
